name: American Liberty Mortgage - Denver
description_short: Denver-based mortgage lender specializing in home purchase loans, refinancing, and reverse mortgages for FHA, VA, conventional, and DSCR borrowers.
description_long:
American Liberty Mortgage, Inc. is a locally owned and operated mortgage company founded in 2003, now in its 23rd year of business. Located in Denver's LoHi neighborhood at 1932 W 33rd Ave, the company positions itself as a community-focused lender serving Colorado homebuyers and existing borrowers. The firm emphasizes long-term client relationships over transaction volume, with leadership that has navigated multiple market cycles in the mortgage industry.

The company offers a comprehensive range of mortgage products including home purchase loans, FHA and VA refinancing, conventional loan refinancing, reverse mortgages for seniors, DSCR loans (likely for investment properties), CHFA loans (Colorado Housing and Finance Authority programs), and one-time close construction loans for home builders. They also provide educational content through their "ALM Radio" program and mortgage calculators to help borrowers understand their financing options.

American Liberty Mortgage differentiates itself through local ownership, personalized one-on-one service with loan specialists, and a stated commitment to securing the lowest rates and closing costs in the Denver and Colorado markets. The company highlights customer service quality as a core value and offers a quick quote process for prospective borrowers. Their team explicitly markets to first-time homebuyers, refinancing borrowers, and debt consolidators seeking tailored solutions.

The company operates transparently on its website with clear contact information (303-416-7000) and an online application process. However, specific interest rates, closing cost structures, and detailed loan terms are not publicly displayed on the website, which is standard industry practice but means borrowers must contact the lender directly for pricing. No independent third-party ratings or reviews are embedded in the provided website content.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Locally owned and operated Denver company with 23 years of operating history since 2003
Offers specialized loan programs including DSCR, CHFA, and one-time close construction financing beyond standard mortgages
Provides FHA Streamline refinancing with reduced paperwork and simplified eligibility requirements
Reverse mortgage specialist services available for seniors with home equity
Educational content through ALM Radio program and mortgage calculators to improve borrower financial literacy
One-on-one personalized service model with loan specialists rather than volume-focused approach
Serves multiple loan types (FHA, VA, conventional, DSCR, CHFA) under one lender
cons: No interest rates, APRs, or closing cost estimates displayed on website; requires direct contact for pricing information
Limited third-party verification or independent reviews visible on provided website content
Small local lender may have fewer resources and product flexibility compared to national mortgage companies
Website does not clearly specify minimum credit score requirements, down payment minimums, or loan amount limits
No information about loan processing timelines, approval rates, or customer satisfaction metrics publicly available
best_for: Denver and Colorado homebuyers seeking personalized service from a locally owned mortgage lender
Borrowers with FHA, VA, or conventional loans looking to refinance with streamlined processes
Seniors interested in reverse mortgages to access home equity without selling
Real estate investors or home builders needing DSCR loans or one-time close construction financing
diagnosis: American Liberty Mortgage is best for Colorado homebuyers and refinancing borrowers who value personalized service and community relationships over digital-first or national lender convenience. The main caveat is that as a small local lender, they may have less product flexibility, slower processing, and higher overhead costs compared to large national mortgage companies, though their local expertise and customized approach appeal to borrowers prioritizing relationship banking.
services: Home purchase loans with emphasis on competitive rates and low closing costs
FHA Streamline refinancing with reduced documentation requirements
Conventional loan refinancing and rate-and-term changes
Reverse mortgage products for homeowners 62+ with substantial equity
DSCR (Debt Service Coverage Ratio) loans for investment properties
CHFA (Colorado Housing and Finance Authority) loan programs
One-time close construction loans for home builders
Mortgage calculators and financial planning tools
Quick quote process for rate estimates
Educational content and financial literacy resources via ALM Radio
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
